scope: Demo/capture replay validation contract for docs/plans/2026-06-05-networking-2.md

semantic_contract: read serverCommandSequence before configstrings and baselines
accept svc_configstring records into gameState string storage
read svc_baseline entity numbers with GENTITYNUM_BITS
reconstruct baselines with MSG_ReadDeltaEntity from an all-zero nullstate
read clientNum and checksumFeed after svc_EOF, then run systeminfo and download initialization
server writes svc_snapshot, serverTime, lastframe, snapFlags, areamask, playerstate delta, then packet entities
client resolves deltaNum 0 as an uncompressed frame with no old snapshot
client resolves nonzero deltaNum relative to clc.serverMessageSequence
client reads areamask before MSG_ReadDeltaPlayerstate and packet entities
valid snapshots replace cl.snap and are stored in cl.snapshots[messageNum & PACKET_MASK]
unchanged old entities are copied when oldnum < newnum
matching old and new entity numbers delta from the previous state
new entities delta from sv.svEntities[number].baseline on the server and cl.entityBaselines[number] on the client
removed entities are emitted as oldent to NULL with force qtrue
MAX_GENTITIES - 1 terminates packetentities
invalid old snapshots keep newSnap.valid false
old->messageNum mismatches keep newSnap.valid false
cl.parseEntitiesNum - old->parseEntitiesNum greater than MAX_PARSE_ENTITIES - 128 rejects the snapshot
rejected snapshots are still consumed from the message but are not copied into cl.snap
FRAGMENT_BIT is stripped from the sequence before ordering checks
server-side processing consumes qport before fragment metadata when the profile enables client qport
fragmentStart must equal chan->fragmentLength or the message is deferred
fragmentLength must be nonnegative, within the packet, and within the reassembly buffer
FRAGMENT_SIZE fragments return qfalse until the terminal short fragment arrives
terminal fragments copy the sequence to msg->data[0..3], payload to msg->data + 4, set cursize to fragmentLength + 4, readcount to 4, bit to 32, and accept the message
SV_Netchan_Transmit always appends svc_EOF before send or queue
messages queued behind active fragments are copied before XOR encoding
the current fragment train advances immediately after queueing a follow-up message
queued messages are XOR-encoded only when popped by SV_Netchan_TransmitNextFragment
queue tail pointers are reset when the last queued message is popped
capture fixtures must declare whether they are byte-for-byte packet captures or semantic message transcripts
byte-for-byte reports compare datagram bytes after deterministic OOB/compression/XOR state is established
semantic reports compare ordered gamestate, snapshot, entity, stale-delta, and fragment fields when adaptive Huffman state prevents stable standalone packet bytes
missing retail captures are reported as an external evidence gap rather than a source parity failure

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: svc_configstring records followed by svc_baseline records and svc_EOF
expected_steps: MSG_ReadShort configstring index and MSG_ReadBigString value
MSG_ReadBits baseline entity number with GENTITYNUM_BITS
Com_Memset nullstate to zero entityState_t storage
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: baseline entries are deterministic input to later packet-entity baseline deltas

expected_steps: CL_ParsePacketEntities uses entity baselines for new entities
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: snapshot is valid without a previous frame

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: svc_snapshot with nonzero deltaNum byte and retained old snapshot
expected_steps: old snapshot is selected by deltaNum & PACKET_MASK
old->valid and old->messageNum are checked before accepting
packet entities merge unchanged, delta, baseline, and removed cases
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: snapshot is copied to cl.snap and cl.snapshots when all aging checks pass

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: old snapshot retained but cl.parseEntitiesNum - old->parseEntitiesNum is 1921
expected_steps: Delta parseEntitiesNum too old diagnostic is reachable
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: client requests recovery from a non-delta snapshot path

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: ordered old and new entity lists containing unchanged, changed, new, and removed entities
expected_steps: oldnum < newnum copies unchanged old state
oldnum == newnum reads a delta from oldstate
oldnum > newnum reads a delta from baseline
server oldnum > newnum emits oldent to NULL
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: client parseEntities ring matches server snapshotEntities semantic state

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: two fragments with identical sequence, contiguous starts, and terminal short fragment
expected_steps: terminal short fragment appends to chan->fragmentBuffer
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: endpoint parser sees one accepted unfragmented message body

semantic_replay_vectors.input_shape: server emits a follow-up message while client->netchan.unsentFragments is true
expected_steps: MSG_Copy stores the unencoded message in a netchan queue node
Netchan_TransmitNextFragment advances the current fragment train
SV_Netchan_TransmitNextFragment later calls SV_Netchan_Encode before Netchan_Transmit
queue start and end pointers advance after pop
semantic_replay_vectors.expected_outcome: queued datagram bytes are encoded with send-time sequence and command-string state

required_future_fixture_sources: retail packet capture containing gamestate and at least two snapshots
fragmented server-message capture with a queued follow-up message

retail_anchors.observed: Reads 10-bit entity numbers, merges unchanged/delta/baseline cases, and terminates at 0x3ff.
Reads serverTime, deltaNum, snapFlags, areamask, playerstate, packet entities, and rejects stale deltas.
Reads configstrings and baselines, rebuilding baselines from zero entityState_t storage.
Writes sequence|FRAGMENT_BIT, optional qport, fragmentStart, fragmentLength, and payload.
Queues large messages into unsentBuffer and starts the fragment train.
Rejects out-of-order packets, enforces fragment contiguity, and rebuilds terminal fragments into a normal message.
Pops queued messages after the active fragment train finishes and encodes them immediately before transmit.
Appends svc_EOF, queues unencoded follow-up messages behind active fragments, or encodes and transmits immediately.
Emits unchanged/delta/baseline/remove entity cases and writes the MAX_GENTITIES - 1 sentinel.
Writes svc_snapshot, serverTime, lastframe, snapFlags, areamask, playerstate delta, and packet entities.
Builds the client snapshot source consumed by SV_WriteSnapshotToClient.

remaining_gaps: No committed retail packet capture or protocol-91 demo transcript is available for byte-for-byte replay.

Capture-scoped adaptive Huffman fixtures are now defined in docs/reverse-engineering/network-adaptive-huffman-fixtures-2026-06-05.json; external retail packet captures are still needed for byte-for-byte replay.
Fragmented snapshot plus queued follow-up behavior is statically pinned but still needs an external capture for byte-for-byte timing validation.
